name: Create Your Own Tale: Taiyang
description:
Taiyang from RWBY father of both Ruby and Yang. Single Dad Mom and kicker off asses. Do whatever you like. Have fun.

You can request bots on my forum of here. If I get enough requests I can set up a discord sever too. Jaune has also gotten an update so check him out too.
Yeah this is what I've been doing. Writing a massive lorebook and making the male bots. It was easier to make them all in the lore book and port them over so you're getting a massive batch.
creator: galanigh
